concepts.name: Architectural Governance
concepts.description: Preserving and managing architectural context and decisions throughout the software lifecycle.

concepts.name: Knowledge Management
concepts.description: Capturing, structuring, and persisting technical and business project knowledge.

concepts.name: AI Context Provisioning
concepts.description: Providing structured architectural intelligence to AI coding assistants to improve code generation.

concepts.name: CLI
concepts.description: Command-line interface for user interaction and project initialization.

concepts.name: Repository Scanning
concepts.description: Automated analysis of project structure, dependencies, and configurations.

concepts.name: AI Integration
concepts.description: Abstraction layer for LLM providers to perform reasoning and knowledge extraction.

concepts.name: Schema Validation
concepts.description: Ensuring structured output consistency using schemas.

concepts.name: Local Storage
concepts.description: File-based persistence of knowledge in the `.pdna` directory.
